case_title: CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. VS. DEBORAH C WENZEL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. SERVED NOV-29-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WENZEL, DEBORAH C
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ; CONDITIONAL SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT WENZEL, DEBORAH C

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT WENZEL, DEBORAH C SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-18-2011
DECLARATION OF PLTF'S COUNSEL RE: DEFAULT UNDER STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE CASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR MAR-12-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WENZEL, DEBORAH C $1,303.06 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,303.06, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-12-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.
